LEAK_CONTROL_POLICY_DEFAULT.desc: Load leak control policy with default enabled settings

LEAK_CONTROL_POLICY_DISABLED.desc: Load leak control policy with both policies disabled

LEAK_CONTROL_POLICY_POWER_OFF_ON_CRITICA.desc: Load leak control policy with graceful_shutdown on rack_mgr critical and power_off on system critical

LEAK_CONTROL_POLICY_INVALID_ACTION.desc: Load leak control policy with an invalid action value

LEAK_CONTROL_POLICY_INVALID_POLICY_STATE.desc: Load leak control policy with an invalid policy state value

LEAK_PROFILE_VALID.desc: Load valid leak profile entries for rope and spot sensor types

LEAK_PROFILE_ZERO_DURATION.desc: Load leak profile with max_minor_duration_sec set to 0 (escalation disabled)

LEAK_PROFILE_INVALID_SENSOR_TYPE_EMPTY.desc: Load leak profile with empty sensor_type key (violates length constraint)
